TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Philippe_of_Belgium, title = Philippe_of_Belgium, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Philippe_of_Belgium} }

S.FORM: = Philippe of Belgium = Mntucing hngkawas 1960 idas 4 jiyax 15 ka Philippe of Belgium ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Belguim ta sayang o kiya ka Philippe of Belgium, pnaah hngkawas 2313 idas 7 jiyax 21 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Philip Bukung Belgium = Philip (phnang kari Netherlands: (fi.l…™p), kngkawas 1960 idas 4 diyax 15) ka Sediq Belgium Na Bukong Qnlhangan. Philip pa kiya ka laqi snaw qbsuran Albert II Bukung Qnlhangan mi Paola Qridin Bukung. Kngkawas 2013 idas 7 diyax 21 cida, tama niya alaw mnarux ka qbubur dmi malax qpahun niya mBukung daw, Philip ka rmirih qpahun mBukung. Philip pa mniq kngkawas 1999 cida tuhuy Mathilde d'Udekem d'Acoz msturung, kiya mi msupu tnquli 4 laqi. Kndusan cuxal Philip pa mntuting kngkawas 1960 idas 4 diyax 15. Albert Cinwang ka tama niya, bubu niya ka Reyj Kongcu Paola. Mntuting 1 idas daw, Philip u mniq Brussels (sotu na Belgium) na Pnrhulan Saint Jacques-sur-Coudenberg psdhu ptwaya pcuyuq qsiya, kiya mi dmuwi hangan tama rudan tama rudan niya Vloandern Philip Cinwang muda tmhangan Philip. Kyoiku Kngkawas 1978 dhuq kngkawas 1981 cida, Philip u mniq tu118 kay "Promotion Toutes Armes" cida muyas Belgium Pyasan Hwangcya Cyuns Sweyweyn. Kngkawas 1980 idas 9 diyax 26 cida, Philip u wada phyuwan Sawwey mi wada psdhuwan phiyu. Philip u lmutuc mniq Turu Kingal Sweyweyn, Pyasan Tubeyhing Oxford muyas, Philip u tumal keyngkyosey ying mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Sttanford muyas, kiya u mniq kngkawas 1985 mnhdu muyas, wada mangal Seyjiswey Swos Sweywey. Kiya uri u Philip pa wada mangal Mcbu Skoki Palic Mpskaya Niya, kiya mi patas meyngkyo Rakasang mi Tuci Tuyweyn uri. Mnsturung Philip pa mniq kngkawas 1999 idas 12 diyax 4 cida tuhuy Mathilde d'Udekem d'Acoz msturung, kiya mi niqan 4 laqi dha: Elizabeth Kongcu, Gabriel Wangc, Ringkwang Wangc mi Eleonore Kongcu. Bukung Qnlhangan Philip mi Qridin Bukung Mathilde msdungus muda pkla kari mnhdu psdhuwan burah Bukung Belgium daw, mpniq Brusselssnquri ssediq muda phiyu bawa smqaras. Snquri qnlhangan icil mawyi Kngkawas 1993 idas 8 diyax 6 cida, seyhu Belgium u muda phiyu Philip ngalan Belgium Mquri Nganguc Mawyi Weyweynhuy (BFTB) Minggi Cusi. Philip ka rmirih tama niya snpeyyah kngkawas 1962 prading ngalan BFTB Minggi Cusi. Kngkawas 2003 idas 5 diyax 3 cida, Philip u wada phyuwan Waymawsu Minggi Cusi, rmirih BFTB. Tumal Bukung Qnlhangan Albert II pa mniq kngkawas 2013 idas 7 diyax 21 malax qpahan Bukung, Philip Cinwang ka psdhuwan phiyu Bukung Qnlhangan Belgium. Qbsuran laqi qridin Philip Elizabeth Kongcu ka mpririh hiya hiti, mpmusa mwaya tu1 Bukung Qridin Qnlhangan Belgium. Qmlahang Philip pa mniq mnhdu kngkawas 2014 Belgium Ryeynpang Knbeyhing Seyngkyo daw, mniq quri so msupu phiyu pnspuwan seyhu pa niqan balay dndulan niya. Kngkawas 2019 idas 5 cida, Philip u mtqita dqras Vlaams Belang Congcay Tom Van Grieken, niyi ka Tang dha mntxal balay muda syotay Hwangs kwancong. Kngkawas 2020 cida, Philip u muda pkla kari pquri so ndan dha cbiyaw mniq mnBelgium na Congo "Mqnaqah Nuda Pphuqil mi Tmseyyax" u muda psruwa qnquwan dha mi qnnaqah kuxul niya. Knrdax mi ppuniq Knrdax Qnlhangan Knrdax Qnlhangan Icil Ppuniq Papak
S.PHON: = pńßilipp…ô o* b…ôlgium = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka pńßilipp…ô o* b…ôlgium ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan b…ôlguim ta sajaŇč o kija ka pńßilipp…ô o* b…ôlgium, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = pńßilip bukuŇč b…ôlgium = pńßilip (pńßnaŇč ka…ĺi n…ôtńß…ô…ĺlands: (*i.l*p), kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **) ka s…ôdiq b…ôlgium na bukoŇč qnlńßaŇčan. pńßilip pa kija ka laqi snaw qbsu…ĺan alb…ô…ĺt ii bukuŇč qnlńßaŇčan mi paola q…ĺidin bukuŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, tama nija alaw mna…ĺux ka qbubu…ĺ dmi malax qpańßun nija mbukuŇč daw, pńßilip ka …ĺmi…ĺińß qpańßun mbukuŇč. pńßilip pa mniq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida tuńßuj matńßild…ô d'ud…ôk…ôm d'a ¶o* mstu…ĺuŇč, kija mi msupu tnquli * laqi. kndusan ¶uxal pńßilip pa mntutiŇč kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **. alb…ô…ĺt ¶inwaŇč ka tama nija, bubu nija ka …ĺ…ô…ü koŇč ¶u paola. mntutiŇč * idas daw, pńßilip u mniq b…ĺuss…ôls (sotu na b…ôlgium) na pn…ĺńßulan saint …üa ¶qu…ôs-su…ĺ- ¶oud…ônb…ô…ĺg psdńßu ptwaja p ¶ujuq qsija, kija mi dmuwi ńßaŇčan tama …ĺudan tama …ĺudan nija *loand…ô…ĺn pńßilip ¶inwaŇč muda tmńßaŇčan pńßilip. kjoiku kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, pńßilip u mniq tu*** kaj "p…ĺomotion tout…ôs a…ĺm…ôs" ¶ida mujas b…ôlgium pjasan ńßwaŇč ¶ja ¶juns sw…ôw…ôn. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, pńßilip u wada pńßjuwan saww…ô mi wada psdńßuwan pńßiju. pńßilip u lmutu ¶ mniq tu…ĺu kiŇčal sw…ôw…ôn, pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ox*o…ĺd mujas, pńßilip u tumal k…ôŇčkjos…ô jiŇč mniq pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč sttan*o…ĺd mujas, kija u mniq kŇčkawas **** mnńßdu mujas, wada maŇčal s…ô…üisw…ô swos sw…ôw…ô. kija u…ĺi u pńßilip pa wada maŇčal m ¶bu skoki pali ¶ mpskaja nija, kija mi patas m…ôŇčkjo …ĺakasaŇč mi tu ¶i tujw…ôn u…ĺi. mnstu…ĺuŇč pńßilip pa mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax * ¶ida tuńßuj matńßild…ô d'ud…ôk…ôm d'a ¶o* mstu…ĺuŇč, kija mi niqan * laqi dńßa: …ôli*ab…ôtńß koŇč ¶u, gab…ĺi…ôl waŇč ¶, …ĺiŇčkwaŇč waŇč ¶ mi …ôl…ôono…ĺ…ô koŇč ¶u. bukuŇč qnlńßaŇčan pńßilip mi q…ĺidin bukuŇč matńßild…ô msduŇčus muda pkla ka…ĺi mnńßdu psdńßuwan bu…ĺańß bukuŇč b…ôlgium daw, mpniq b…ĺuss…ôlssnqu…ĺi ss…ôdiq muda pńßiju bawa smqa…ĺas. snqu…ĺi qnlńßaŇčan i ¶il mawji kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * ¶ida, s…ôńßu b…ôlgium u muda pńßiju pńßilip Ňčalan b…ôlgium mqu…ĺi ŇčaŇču ¶ mawji w…ôw…ônńßuj (b*tb) miŇčgi ¶usi. pńßilip ka …ĺmi…ĺińß tama nija snp…ôjańß kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč Ňčalan b*tb miŇčgi ¶usi. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * ¶ida, pńßilip u wada pńßjuwan wajmawsu miŇčgi ¶usi, …ĺmi…ĺińß b*tb. tumal bukuŇč qnlńßaŇčan alb…ô…ĺt ii pa mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** malax qpańßan bukuŇč, pńßilip ¶inwaŇč ka psdńßuwan pńßiju bukuŇč qnlńßaŇčan b…ôlgium. qbsu…ĺan laqi q…ĺidin pńßilip …ôli*ab…ôtńß koŇč ¶u ka mp…ĺi…ĺińß ńßija ńßiti, mpmusa mwaja tu* bukuŇč q…ĺidin qnlńßaŇčan b…ôlgium. qmlańßaŇč pńßilip pa mniq mnńßdu kŇčkawas **** b…ôlgium …ĺj…ônpaŇč knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo daw, mniq qu…ĺi so msupu pńßiju pnspuwan s…ôńßu pa niqan balaj dndulan nija. kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, pńßilip u mtqita dq…ĺas *laams b…ôlaŇč ¶oŇč ¶aj tom *an g…ĺi…ôk…ôn, niji ka taŇč dńßa mntxal balaj muda sjotaj ńßwaŇčs kwan ¶oŇč. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, pńßilip u muda pkla ka…ĺi pqu…ĺi so ndan dńßa ¶bijaw mniq mnb…ôlgium na ¶oŇčo "mqnaqańß nuda ppńßuqil mi tms…ôjax" u muda ps…ĺuwa qnquwan dńßa mi qnnaqańß kuxul nija. kn…ĺdax mi ppuniq kn…ĺdax qnlńßaŇčan kn…ĺdax qnlńßaŇčan i ¶il ppuniq papak
S.FORM: = Philippe of Belgium = Mntucing hngkawas 1960 idas 4 jiyax 15 ka Philippe of Belgium ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Belguim ta sayang o kiya ka Philippe of Belgium, pnaah hngkawas 2313 idas 7 jiyax 21 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Philip Bukung Belgium = Philip (phnang kari Netherlands: (fi.l…™p), kngkawas 1960 idas 4 diyax 15) ka Sediq Belgium Na Bukong Qnlhangan. Philip pa kiya ka laqi snaw qbsuran Albert II Bukung Qnlhangan mi Paola Qridin Bukung. Kngkawas 2013 idas 7 diyax 21 cida, tama niya alaw mnarux ka qbubur dmi malax qpahun niya mBukung daw, Philip ka rmirih qpahun mBukung. Philip pa mniq kngkawas 1999 cida tuhuy Mathilde d'Udekem d'Acoz msturung, kiya mi msupu tnquli 4 laqi. Kndusan cuxal Philip pa mntuting kngkawas 1960 idas 4 diyax 15. Albert Cinwang ka tama niya, bubu niya ka Reyj Kongcu Paola. Mntuting 1 idas daw, Philip u mniq Brussels (sotu na Belgium) na Pnrhulan Saint Jacques-sur-Coudenberg psdhu ptwaya pcuyuq qsiya, kiya mi dmuwi hangan tama rudan tama rudan niya Vloandern Philip Cinwang muda tmhangan Philip. Kyoiku Kngkawas 1978 dhuq kngkawas 1981 cida, Philip u mniq tu118 kay "Promotion Toutes Armes" cida muyas Belgium Pyasan Hwangcya Cyuns Sweyweyn. Kngkawas 1980 idas 9 diyax 26 cida, Philip u wada phyuwan Sawwey mi wada psdhuwan phiyu. Philip u lmutuc mniq Turu Kingal Sweyweyn, Pyasan Tubeyhing Oxford muyas, Philip u tumal keyngkyosey ying mniq Pyasan Tubeyhing Sttanford muyas, kiya u mniq kngkawas 1985 mnhdu muyas, wada mangal Seyjiswey Swos Sweywey. Kiya uri u Philip pa wada mangal Mcbu Skoki Palic Mpskaya Niya, kiya mi patas meyngkyo Rakasang mi Tuci Tuyweyn uri. Mnsturung Philip pa mniq kngkawas 1999 idas 12 diyax 4 cida tuhuy Mathilde d'Udekem d'Acoz msturung, kiya mi niqan 4 laqi dha: Elizabeth Kongcu, Gabriel Wangc, Ringkwang Wangc mi Eleonore Kongcu. Bukung Qnlhangan Philip mi Qridin Bukung Mathilde msdungus muda pkla kari mnhdu psdhuwan burah Bukung Belgium daw, mpniq Brusselssnquri ssediq muda phiyu bawa smqaras. Snquri qnlhangan icil mawyi Kngkawas 1993 idas 8 diyax 6 cida, seyhu Belgium u muda phiyu Philip ngalan Belgium Mquri Nganguc Mawyi Weyweynhuy (BFTB) Minggi Cusi. Philip ka rmirih tama niya snpeyyah kngkawas 1962 prading ngalan BFTB Minggi Cusi. Kngkawas 2003 idas 5 diyax 3 cida, Philip u wada phyuwan Waymawsu Minggi Cusi, rmirih BFTB. Tumal Bukung Qnlhangan Albert II pa mniq kngkawas 2013 idas 7 diyax 21 malax qpahan Bukung, Philip Cinwang ka psdhuwan phiyu Bukung Qnlhangan Belgium. Qbsuran laqi qridin Philip Elizabeth Kongcu ka mpririh hiya hiti, mpmusa mwaya tu1 Bukung Qridin Qnlhangan Belgium. Qmlahang Philip pa mniq mnhdu kngkawas 2014 Belgium Ryeynpang Knbeyhing Seyngkyo daw, mniq quri so msupu phiyu pnspuwan seyhu pa niqan balay dndulan niya. Kngkawas 2019 idas 5 cida, Philip u mtqita dqras Vlaams Belang Congcay Tom Van Grieken, niyi ka Tang dha mntxal balay muda syotay Hwangs kwancong. Kngkawas 2020 cida, Philip u muda pkla kari pquri so ndan dha cbiyaw mniq mnBelgium na Congo "Mqnaqah Nuda Pphuqil mi Tmseyyax" u muda psruwa qnquwan dha mi qnnaqah kuxul niya. Knrdax mi ppuniq Knrdax Qnlhangan Knrdax Qnlhangan Icil Ppuniq Papak

u lmutu ¶ mniq tu…ĺu kiŇčal sw…ôw…ôn, pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ox*o…ĺd mujas, pńßilip u tumal k…ôŇčkjos…ô jiŇč mniq pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč sttan*o…ĺd mujas, kija u mniq kŇčkawas **** mnńßdu mujas, wada maŇčal s…ô…üisw…ô swos sw…ôw…ô. kija u…ĺi u pńßilip pa wada maŇčal m ¶bu skoki pali ¶ mpskaja nija, kija mi patas m…ôŇčkjo …ĺakasaŇč mi tu ¶i tujw…ôn u…ĺi. mnstu…ĺuŇč pńßilip pa mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax * ¶ida tuńßuj matńßild…ô d'ud…ôk…ôm d'a ¶o* mstu…ĺuŇč, kija mi niqan * laqi dńßa: …ôli*ab…ôtńß koŇč ¶u, gab…ĺi…ôl waŇč ¶, …ĺiŇčkwaŇč waŇč ¶ mi …ôl…ôono…ĺ…ô koŇč ¶u. bukuŇč qnlńßaŇčan pńßilip mi
